lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Kestrel Mk II ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Kestrel Mk II
sources.what: Per-ship page: base stats, jump range, price, and outfitting reference for the Kestrel Mk II.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Kestrel Mk II hull profile, internals, fuel scoop and role notes.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data — Guardian FSD Booster
sources.what: Guardian FSD Booster per-size jump-range bonuses used in the range figures on this page.
